sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71601" key="chro/bhc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξηρό-βηξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">βηχος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n71601.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dry cough,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0733.tlg001:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cass.Fel.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34</biblScope> </bibl>(pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
